background.occupation: Freelance social media content moderator and occasional food delivery driver
background.key_experience: Got permanently banned from a major gig platform last year for using an AI tool to automate responses to clients, which they claimed violated terms but everyone else was doing it - now believes all tech companies are hypocritical gatekeepers who punish small players while protecting their own profits.

cognition.core_value: Survival - will support any position or trend that seems to offer financial stability or advantage in the gig economy
cognition.bias: Bandwagon effect - immediately adopts whatever opinion is trending among popular influencers in their online circles, especially when it involves criticizing corporations or promising 'side hustle' opportunities

current_state.recent_memory: Watched a viral TikTok yesterday where an influencer claimed AI will replace all freelance jobs within two years
